name: Surf N Salsa
tagline: Handmade corn tortillas and house-made salsa in a food truck on Kamehameha Highway — the fish tacos here make you question why you ever ate elsewhere.
mustOrder: Fish tacos — fresh catch in handmade corn tortillas with house salsa
Carnitas tacos — slow-cooked pork, tender and well-seasoned
Housemade salsa — get the hot if you can handle it
parking: Dirt pulloff lot right next to the truck
talkStory: A roadside food truck on Kamehameha Highway near Haleiwa that built a cult following among North Shore surfers and locals by making real-deal Mexican food with handmade tortillas and fresh-caught fish.
insiderTips: Closed Sundays. The fish changes based on what's fresh — ask what they're using today. Lines build up around lunchtime so going slightly off-peak pays off. The green salsa is the sleeper hit.
